desc: Applies default Revit resolution to warnings that have available auto-fixes.
summary: Applies default Revit resolution to warnings that have available auto-fixes. Use MCP.GetWarningsWithAvailableAutoResolutions to preview first. IMPORTANT: Some resolutions DELETE elements — always describe the fix to user first.
precondition: Active document must have warnings with available resolutions.
postcondition: Resolvable warnings are fixed. Some elements may be deleted.

failureprompts: Auto-resolve failed: {error}. Some warnings may need manual review.
